description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a tailored suit jacket, matching trousers, a collared shirt, and a necktie. The figure has a clean-shaven face with defined facial features and short, neatly styled hair. The hands are relaxed and positioned slightly away from the body, and the feet are placed flat on the ground. The suit is well-fitted, with visible lapels, cuffs, and a buttoned front. The shoes are formal and complement the business ensemble. The overall appearance suggests a professional individual, likely encountered in urban environments such as offices, sidewalks, or business districts.
description: A male adult in a formal business suit with a collared shirt and tie, standing upright with arms slightly out. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and wears formal shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit's lapels, tie, shirt collar, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, suit sleeve, and straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, suit sleeve, and straight posture.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and necktie
